name: Spectral Spell
description: Notes The animated staff and skull summoned by this item act like standard summons with follow speeds of 1.15, and have the following sprites & projectile sprites:
effects: With Phantom Pendant: Summons Animated Staff for 4.8 seconds that deals 130-150 armor piercing damage Summons Spectral Skull for 4.8 seconds that deals 90-100 damage and inflicts Slowed for 3 seconds Cooldown: 5.8 seconds Ignores defense of target
